content:
## Account Fit
Harbor Starter Business Checking is a Northstar Bank business deposit account for customers who need business_checking service without interest or earnings allowance features. Use this account class only when the customer is asking about Harbor Starter Business Checking or comparing it with another listed business checking product. See "Business Checking Product Comparison" when the customer wants side-by-side product selection.

## Opening and Core Terms
| Term | Harbor Starter Business Checking |
|---|---|
| Minimum opening deposit | $25 |
| Monthly fee | $15 |
| Monthly transaction band maximum | 100 |
| Interest bearing | False |
| Earnings allowance eligible | False |

## Fee Waiver and Linked Accounts
The monthly fee may be waived through a minimum daily balance of $2000, a combined deposit balance of $5000, or a premium personal relationship waiver of True. The account includes 1 linked account, and each additional linked account has a fee of $0. See "Business Checking Fee Waiver Policy" for applying waiver criteria consistently.
title: Harbor Starter Business Checking Terms
